findings.description: The introductory paragraph ('なお、計算そのものは非常に簡単です。基本的には算数や中学数学の知識があれば必ず解答できます。') is not captured as a separate entity. It is brief scene-setting text; the omission does not affect exam-content coverage.

reviewer_notes: The example problem, work-efficiency explanation, three-step worked solution, and exam-tip box are all accurately represented. Calculations in the figure caption match the image step-by-step (20 person-days total, 10 person-days veterans, 4 new members). The introductory framing sentence is the only uncaptured text, rated low severity.
